name: Man-at-Arms
flavor: Realms at War — the backbone of any host. Medieval counterpart of the Infantry (same chassis).

specialAction.name: Scout the Field
specialAction.summary: Place up to 2 Exposed tokens on enemy Warriors. They do not need to be valid targets. Each Exposed token lowers that Warrior's Armour.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, make 1 Move after this Attack.
